summary.en: The integration layer for live events infrastructure.
summary.zh: 現場活動基礎設施的整合層。

highlight.en: CrowdVolt is rebuilding live events infrastructure, starting with an automated marketplace for raves and electronic dance music.
highlight.zh: CrowdVolt 正在重建現場活動的基礎設施,從銳舞派對與電子舞曲的自動化交易市場著手。

summary.en: Open-source humanoid robots.
summary.zh: 開源人形機器人。

highlight.en: K-Scale builds humanoid robots for boring or tedious tasks, releasing an open-source design that can walk, talk, and manipulate objects.
highlight.zh: K-Scale 打造處理無聊或繁瑣工作的人形機器人,並釋出能行走、說話與操作物件的開源設計。

summary.en: AI applied research lab building synthetic sapience and human-like AI.
summary.zh: 打造合成智慧與類人 AI 的 AI 應用研究實驗室。

highlight.en: ego trains an end-to-end model starting with voice, targeting the memory, personality, and relationship gaps where frontier AI like Claude and ChatGPT are weak.
highlight.zh: ego 從語音切入訓練端到端模型,專攻 Claude、ChatGPT 等前沿 AI 在記憶、個性與關係上的弱點。

summary.en: AI for risk and compliance.
summary.zh: 用於風險與法遵的 AI。

highlight.en: ROE AI tackles risk and compliance problems specifically for the financial industry.
highlight.zh: ROE AI 專為金融業解決風險與法遵問題。

summary.en: Interpretable AI models and agents.
summary.zh: 可解釋的 AI 模型與代理。

highlight.en: Guide Labs builds interpretable foundation models that reliably explain their reasoning and are easy to audit and steer, delivered via API.
highlight.zh: Guide Labs 打造可解釋的基礎模型,能可靠說明推理過程、易於稽核與操控,並透過 API 提供。

summary.en: The relationship intelligence platform for enterprise revenue.
summary.zh: 面向企業營收的關係情報平台。

highlight.en: Centralize maps who reps know inside every deal and the fastest path to decision-makers, building the graph of who trusts whom in B2B.
highlight.zh: Centralize 標記業務在每筆交易中認識誰、通往決策者的最快路徑,建構 B2B 的信任關係圖譜。

summary.en: Sentry for AI agents.
summary.zh: AI 代理版的 Sentry。

highlight.en: Raindrop alerts AI engineers to silent failures in their agents and links straight to the events, conversations, and traces needed to find the root cause.
highlight.zh: Raindrop 在 AI 代理發生無聲故障時警示工程師,並直接連到事件、對話與追蹤紀錄以查明根因。

summary.en: A B2B construction marketplace matching contractors and subcontractors.
summary.zh: 媒合總包商與分包商的 B2B 營建交易市場。

highlight.en: Used by over 3,000 companies in Germany's SMB sector, CoCrafter helps contractors find and manage both local and foreign subcontractors.
highlight.zh: CoCrafter 已有超過 3,000 家德國中小企業使用,協助總包商尋找並管理本地與外籍分包商。

summary.en: An AI creative strategist for launching winning ads.
summary.zh: 用於推出致勝廣告的 AI 創意策略師。

highlight.en: GetCrux analyzes ad creatives across 100+ parameters like hooks, messaging, pacing, and music to find winning patterns and recommend what to launch next.
highlight.zh: GetCrux 從鉤子、訊息、節奏、音樂等逾 100 項參數分析廣告創意,找出致勝模式並建議下一步該投放什麼。

summary.en: AI-voice agents that are indistinguishable from humans.
summary.zh: 與真人難以區別的 AI 語音代理。

highlight.en: Founded by the team behind Vlingo, which powered the first Siri app and sold for $225M, Marr Labs builds voice agents for any phone-based job in an $85B market.
highlight.zh: 由打造 Vlingo(支援首版 Siri、以 2.25 億美元出售)的團隊創立,Marr Labs 為各種電話業務打造語音代理,鎖定 850 億美元市場。

summary.en: A reimagined workspace with AI at its core.
summary.zh: 以 AI 為核心重新設計的工作空間。

highlight.en: Built around the spreadsheet primitive, Paradigm orchestrates swarms of intelligent agents as the default platform for structured data.
highlight.zh: Paradigm 以試算表為基本單元,調度大量智慧代理,成為結構化資料的預設代理協作平台。

summary.en: Give your voice agents a face.
summary.zh: 為你的語音代理加上一張臉。

highlight.en: LemonSlice is an AI lab for interactive video whose avatar models turn a single photo into a real-time FaceTime-like video call.
highlight.zh: LemonSlice 是專注互動影像的 AI 實驗室,其虛擬人模型能把單張照片變成如 FaceTime 般的即時視訊通話。

summary.en: An AI sales platform for home services.
summary.zh: 面向家庭服務業的 AI 銷售平台。

highlight.en: Aether replaces fragmented tools and autonomously runs end-to-end sales workflows, focusing on roofing and exteriors like gutters, windows, and painting.
highlight.zh: Aether 取代零散工具並自動端到端執行銷售流程,聚焦屋頂與外牆(排水溝、窗戶、油漆)業者。

summary.en: AI-powered meeting notes and automations.
summary.zh: 由 AI 驅動的會議記錄與自動化。

highlight.en: Circleback turns conversations into notes, action items, and automations, e.g. creating Linear tasks from demo-call feature requests or updating a CRM after sales calls.
highlight.zh: Circleback 把對話轉為筆記、待辦與自動化,例如從演示通話的功能需求建立 Linear 任務,或在銷售通話後更新 CRM。

summary.en: Control what AI says about you.
summary.zh: 掌控 AI 如何描述你的企業。

highlight.en: Senso lets enterprises register agent-first domains and publish verified, structured ground truth that AI agents can safely answer from and transact against.
highlight.zh: Senso 讓企業註冊以代理為先的網域,並發布經驗證的結構化基準資料,供 AI 代理安全引用與交易。

summary.en: Agent-driven engineering for simulation.
summary.zh: 由代理驅動的模擬工程。

highlight.en: Navier AI runs CFD simulations at scale on OpenFOAM, with AI agents autonomously handling geometry cleanup, meshing, solver setup, and cloud resources.
highlight.zh: Navier AI 以業界標準求解器 OpenFOAM 大規模執行 CFD 模擬,讓 AI 代理自動處理幾何清理、網格、求解器設定與雲端資源。

summary.en: Validated mental health support in your pocket, anytime.
summary.zh: 隨時可用、經驗證的口袋心理健康支持。

highlight.en: Founded by MIT and ETH researchers published at NeurIPS, ICML, and EMNLP, Sonia builds safe, voice-based AI for accessible mental health support.
highlight.zh: 由曾於 NeurIPS、ICML、EMNLP 發表論文的 MIT 與 ETH 研究者創立,Sonia 打造安全的語音 AI,讓心理健康支持更普及。

summary.en: Delightful robots that tidy your home.
summary.zh: 令人愉悅、幫你整理家務的機器人。

highlight.en: Tuesday makes delightful robots that tidy your home for you.
highlight.zh: Tuesday 打造令人愉悅、替你整理居家環境的機器人。

summary.en: AI for robot arms in factories.
summary.zh: 用於工廠機械手臂的 AI。

highlight.en: Pivot Robotics' AI software automates labor-intensive manufacturing tasks, starting with metal grinding deployed on 10+ robots in a cast-iron foundry.
highlight.zh: Pivot Robotics 的 AI 軟體自動化勞力密集的製造工序,從危險的金屬研磨切入,已部署於某鑄鐵廠逾 10 台機器人。

summary.en: An app to read fiction stories as visual novels with images and video.
summary.zh: 以圖像與影片把小說讀成視覺小說的 App。

highlight.en: Wuri transforms fiction into visual novels with audio, images, and video, letting writers and readers offer or consume stories in their preferred format.
highlight.zh: Wuri 把小說轉為含音訊、圖像與影片的視覺小說,讓作者與讀者以偏好的形式提供或閱讀故事。

summary.en: A platform where autonomous companies are built.
summary.zh: 用於打造自主公司的平台。

highlight.en: Pazi lets people create agents for roles like developer or SDR, give them a goal such as reaching 10k followers, and have them plan and check in autonomously.
highlight.zh: Pazi 讓人為開發者、SDR 等職位建立代理,賦予如「X 達到 1 萬粉絲」的目標,由代理自行規劃並定期回報。

summary.en: An all-in-one API for search, RAG, and recommendations.
summary.zh: 整合搜尋、RAG 與推薦的一站式 API。

highlight.en: Trieve offers production-ready discovery infrastructure with custom models, relevancy weighting, date-recency biasing, and semantic full-text hybrid search.
highlight.zh: Trieve 提供可立即上線的探索基礎設施,涵蓋自訂模型、相關性加權、時間近因偏好與語意全文混合搜尋。

summary.en: Practice administration run by AI.
summary.zh: 由 AI 運作的診所行政作業。

highlight.en: OpenCall makes medical practices more profitable and helps rollup owners and operators hit their KPIs.
highlight.zh: OpenCall 提升醫療診所獲利,並協助整併集團的業主與營運者達成關鍵績效指標。

summary.en: A secure AI assistant embedded directly into Slack.
summary.zh: 直接嵌入 Slack 的安全 AI 助理。

highlight.en: Diana is positioned as the first business-ready OpenClaw platform, giving each employee a secure AI assistant inside Slack.
highlight.zh: Diana 自詡為首個適合企業使用的 OpenClaw 平台,在 Slack 內為每位員工提供安全的 AI 助理。

summary.en: Authoring life-sciences documents in minutes, not months.
summary.zh: 以分鐘而非數月撰寫生命科學文件。

highlight.en: Artos turns life-sciences data into critical regulatory submissions in minutes, clearing the final hurdle that today takes months before companies can sell.
highlight.zh: Artos 把生命科學資料在數分鐘內轉為關鍵法規送件文件,跨越目前需耗時數月、產品上市前的最後關卡。

summary.en: The orchestration platform for teams who ship.
summary.zh: 為高速交付團隊打造的調度平台。

highlight.en: Hatchet provides a simple, reliable orchestration layer for managing and observing AI agents, background tasks, and mission-critical workflows.
highlight.zh: Hatchet 提供簡單可靠的調度層,用於管理與觀測 AI 代理、背景任務與關鍵工作流程。

summary.en: Reprogramming immunity for target-specific medicines.
summary.zh: 重新編程免疫系統以打造標靶專一藥物。

highlight.en: Granza Bio's platform builds on immune "superkiller" attack particles, re-arming exhausted immune cells to treat diseases from cancer to autoimmunity.
highlight.zh: Granza Bio 的平台奠基於免疫「超級殺手」攻擊顆粒,為耗竭的免疫細胞重新裝填彈藥,以治療從癌症到自體免疫的疾病。

summary.en: A cargo theft and fraud prevention platform.
summary.zh: 貨運盜竊與詐欺防範平台。

highlight.en: Drawing on experience fighting fraud at major delivery and logistics firms, Indemni builds tools to stop rising cargo theft for warehouses and freight brokers.
highlight.zh: Indemni 借鏡在大型配送與物流公司打擊詐欺的經驗,為倉儲與貨運經紀商打造工具,遏止逐年攀升的貨運盜竊。

summary.en: The RFP platform that asset managers adopt.
summary.zh: 資產管理公司採用的 RFP 平台。

highlight.en: GovernGPT uses AI to fill diligence questionnaires in minutes instead of days, with clients including Bridgewater, Pantheon, Coatue, and Onex.
highlight.zh: GovernGPT 以 AI 在數分鐘內(而非數天)填寫盡職調查問卷,客戶包括 Bridgewater、Pantheon、Coatue 與 Onex。

summary.en: Autonomously scaling environments for AI training.
summary.zh: 為 AI 訓練自主擴展環境。

highlight.en: Vibrant Labs develops methods to autonomously scale evals and environments for post-training agents.
highlight.zh: Vibrant Labs 開發自主擴展評測與環境的方法,用於後訓練階段的代理。

summary.en: A social feed for interactive AI creations.
summary.zh: 互動式 AI 創作的社群動態牆。

highlight.en: Built by the tensorfuse team, Whip lets users create, discover, and remix playable mini apps like trivia, quizzes, and party games in a social feed.
highlight.zh: 由 tensorfuse 團隊打造的 Whip 讓用戶在社群動態牆建立、探索並二創如益智、測驗與派對遊戲等可玩迷你應用。

summary.en: A local business data intelligence platform.
summary.zh: 本地商家資料情報平台。

highlight.en: Openmart provides intelligence on local businesses to power sales and go-to-market decisions.
highlight.zh: Openmart 提供本地商家的資料情報,以支援銷售與市場進入決策。

summary.en: An applied AI data research lab encoding human expertise into machines.
summary.zh: 把人類專業編碼進機器的 AI 應用資料研究實驗室。

highlight.en: Ocular AI is an applied data research lab focused on capturing and encoding human expertise into machines.
highlight.zh: Ocular AI 是一間應用資料研究實驗室,專注於擷取人類專業並將其編碼進機器。

summary.en: The AI operating system for commodity operations.
summary.zh: 用於大宗商品營運的 AI 作業系統。

highlight.en: CommodityAI's agents extract and validate details from trade confirmations, contracts, and vessel updates, feeding clean structured records into CTRMs and ERPs.
highlight.zh: CommodityAI 的代理從交易確認書、合約與船舶更新中擷取並驗證細節,把乾淨的結構化資料匯入 CTRM 與 ERP 系統。

summary.en: AI agents for precise document analysis.
summary.zh: 用於精準文件分析的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Powder helps wealth advisors create personalized sales proposals, parsing brokerage, tax, and estate documents, taking meeting notes, and analyzing portfolios.
highlight.zh: Powder 協助財富顧問製作個人化銷售提案,解析券商、稅務與遺產文件、記錄會議,並分析投資組合。

summary.en: Voice AI for the automotive industry.
summary.zh: 汽車產業的語音 AI。

highlight.en: VoxOps automates up to 80% of inbound and outbound calls for garages, dealers, and lenders, plus the downstream workflows that follow.
highlight.zh: VoxOps 為車廠、經銷商與貸款方自動處理多達 80% 的進線與外撥電話,並串接後續工作流程。

summary.en: Make sales and marketing videos with AI.
summary.zh: 用 AI 製作銷售與行銷影片。

highlight.en: Yarn uses TTS, computer vision, and LLMs to let founders and marketers make polished, branded product videos 5x faster than a Loom, no editing experience needed.
highlight.zh: Yarn 運用 TTS、電腦視覺與 LLM,讓創辦人與行銷者以比 Loom 快 5 倍的速度製作精緻品牌產品影片,無需剪輯經驗。

summary.en: Elevated mRNA for transformative medicines.
summary.zh: 以升級版 mRNA 打造變革性藥物。

highlight.en: ParcelBio's APEXm platform uses novel RNA domains to boost protein expression and durability, advancing programs in autoimmune disease and oncology.
highlight.zh: ParcelBio 的 APEXm 平台運用新型 RNA 結構域以提升蛋白質表現與持久性,推進自體免疫疾病與腫瘤學的開發項目。

summary.en: Secured consumer lending in India.
summary.zh: 印度的擔保型消費信貸。

highlight.en: Yenmo lets India's 65M investors pledge their investments digitally for instant loans at a fixed 10.5% rate, versus 18%+ on personal loans.
highlight.zh: Yenmo 讓印度 6,500 萬名投資人以數位方式質押投資、即時取得固定 10.5% 利率的貸款,遠低於個人貸款逾 18% 的利率。

summary.en: Deploy trustworthy data agents that know your business.
summary.zh: 部署懂你業務、值得信賴的資料代理。

highlight.en: Founded by ex-Palantir builders, Upsolve's Agent Studio lets data teams unify their context layer and tune governed, grounded data agents to a benchmark.
highlight.zh: 由前 Palantir 團隊創立,Upsolve 的 Agent Studio 讓資料團隊整合脈絡層,並將受治理、有依據的資料代理調校至基準標準。

summary.en: The open-source platform for managing identity in business software.
summary.zh: 用於管理企業軟體身分的開源平台。

highlight.en: Tesseral adds enterprise auth like SAML SSO, SCIM provisioning, RBAC, managed API keys, and audit logs in a few lines of code, unifying access across users and AI agents.
highlight.zh: Tesseral 以數行程式碼加入 SAML SSO、SCIM 配置、RBAC、託管 API 金鑰與稽核日誌等企業級驗證,統一管理用戶與 AI 代理的存取權限。

summary.en: Constellations as a service.
summary.zh: 星座衛星即服務。

highlight.en: Founded by ex-SpaceX and MIT CubeSat engineers, Basalt builds self-flying satellite constellations users can fly and stream data from via a phone app.
highlight.zh: 由前 SpaceX 與 MIT CubeSat 工程師創立,Basalt 打造自飛衛星星座,用戶可透過手機 App 操控並串流資料。

summary.en: A self-driving AI CRM.
summary.zh: 自動駕駛式的 AI CRM。

highlight.en: Octolane bills itself as the first self-driving AI CRM that updates itself, takes actions, and learns from every interaction so reps never update data manually.
highlight.zh: Octolane 自稱是首個自動駕駛式 AI CRM,能自我更新、採取行動並從每次互動學習,讓業務無需再手動更新資料。

summary.en: Tools to design electronics circuit boards with code.
summary.zh: 用程式碼設計電子電路板的工具。

highlight.en: atopile is an open-source language that replaces point-and-click PCB tools with code, bringing software-level automation and reuse to hardware design.
highlight.zh: atopile 是一種開源語言,以程式碼取代點選式 PCB 工具,把軟體層級的自動化與重用帶入硬體設計。

summary.en: The developer platform for fast and reliable browser agents.
summary.zh: 用於快速可靠瀏覽器代理的開發者平台。

highlight.en: CloudCruise lets developers build healthcare browser automations, running self-healing payer-portal and EHR workflows on fully managed infrastructure.
highlight.zh: CloudCruise 讓開發者建構醫療瀏覽器自動化,在全託管基礎設施上執行可自我修復的付款方入口與電子病歷工作流程。

summary.en: Making it easy for B2B sales teams to send stellar outbound.
summary.zh: 讓 B2B 銷售團隊輕鬆發送出色的外撥開發。

highlight.en: Meticulate codifies a team's sales rules with deep research to send custom sequences to every lead, serving GTM teams at OpenAI, Noda, and ThreeKit.
highlight.zh: Meticulate 把團隊的銷售規則編碼並結合深度研究,為每位潛在客戶發送客製化序列,服務 OpenAI、Noda 與 ThreeKit 等團隊。

summary.en: AI agents for commercial lending.
summary.zh: 用於商業貸款的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Omni works with lenders to modernize small-business lending end to end, from document intake to underwriting, for the 34M U.S. small businesses.
highlight.zh: Omni 與貸款機構合作,從文件收件到核保端到端現代化小型企業放貸,服務全美 3,400 萬家小企業。

summary.en: Unified flight software and hardware for the mission of tomorrow.
summary.zh: 為未來任務打造的整合飛行軟硬體。

highlight.en: Elodin creates flight software, simulations, and hardware for drones, satellites, and defense.
highlight.zh: Elodin 為無人機、衛星與國防打造飛行軟體、模擬與硬體。

summary.en: Shiboleth automates lending compliance for financial institutions.
summary.zh: Shiboleth 為金融機構自動化放貸法遵作業。

highlight.en: Shiboleth uses LLMs to automate consumer-lending audits and government report drafting, saving banks and fintechs months of manual compliance work.
highlight.zh: Shiboleth 運用 LLM 自動化消費信貸稽核與政府報告撰寫,為銀行與金融科技公司省下數月的人工法遵工作。

summary.en: AI-enabled procurement for government.
summary.zh: 政府用的 AI 採購軟體。

highlight.en: Hazel automates the full government procurement process, from requirements generation and market research to solicitation drafting and proposal evaluation.
highlight.zh: Hazel 自動化完整的政府採購流程,涵蓋需求生成、市場研究、招標文件撰寫與提案評估。

summary.en: Faster clinical documentation for home health nurses.
summary.zh: 為居家護理師加速臨床文件撰寫。

highlight.en: Built by ex-Google and ex-Apple health leaders, Andy completes home-visit documentation, yielding up to 45% more detailed charts and 2x nurse productivity.
highlight.zh: 由前 Google 與前 Apple 醫療團隊打造,Andy 替居家訪視完成文件,圖表細節提升達 45%、護理師生產力翻倍。

summary.en: Helping teams evaluate products with real people.
summary.zh: 協助團隊與真實用戶評估產品。

highlight.en: Voicepanel lets teams evaluate features, AI experiences, websites, apps, ads, and messaging with real people to build confidence in what to launch.
highlight.zh: Voicepanel 讓團隊以真實用戶評估功能、AI 體驗、網站、App、廣告與訊息,建立對該推出什麼的信心。

summary.en: Aggregating spot freight opportunities for carriers.
summary.zh: 為承運商匯整即期貨運機會。

highlight.en: Built by ex-Convoy engineering leaders, Manifold aggregates spot shipments from many sources into one place to cut empty miles and boost carrier revenue.
highlight.zh: 由前 Convoy 工程主管打造,Manifold 把來自多個來源的即期貨運匯整於單一平台,減少空車里程並提升承運商營收。

summary.en: The modern ETL and data science platform for finance.
summary.zh: 面向金融業的現代化 ETL 與資料科學平台。

highlight.en: Centauri AI cuts hours of data wrangling from Excel, PDF, and PPT files down to minutes for banks and investment firms, starting with structured finance.
highlight.zh: Centauri AI 為銀行與投資機構把 Excel、PDF、PPT 檔的數小時資料整理縮短至數分鐘,從結構性融資切入。

summary.en: Smart grocery pricing with AI.
summary.zh: 用 AI 進行智慧雜貨定價。

highlight.en: BetterBasket gives grocery retailers AI agents for pricing, competitive intelligence, and promotion optimization using real-time data across operations.
highlight.zh: BetterBasket 為雜貨零售商提供定價、競爭情報與促銷優化的 AI 代理,並以跨營運的即時資料運作。

summary.en: Flexible systems for clinical reasoning.
summary.zh: 用於臨床推理的彈性系統。

highlight.en: Users build copilots in Sample for patient intake and reimbursement that capture ground-truth data; it has data from 76% of US oncology clinics.
highlight.zh: 用戶在 Sample 建構用於病患收件與理賠的 copilot,擷取基準真值資料;其已涵蓋全美 76% 的腫瘤診所資料。

summary.en: Create high-quality presentations quickly using AI.
summary.zh: 用 AI 快速製作高品質簡報。

highlight.en: Alai turns a user's context into a strong first draft with four options per slide in minutes, on a responsive canvas where humans and AI iterate together.
highlight.zh: Alai 把用戶的脈絡在數分鐘內變成優質初稿、每張投影片提供四種選項,並在可讓人與 AI 共同迭代的響應式畫布上運作。

summary.en: Agent context is hard. We fixed it.
summary.zh: 代理脈絡很難,我們解決了。

highlight.en: Zep assembles context from chat history, business data, and behavior with sub-200ms retrieval; its open-source Graphiti hit 20k GitHub stars in under a year.
highlight.zh: Zep 從聊天記錄、業務資料與行為組裝脈絡,檢索低於 200 毫秒;其開源專案 Graphiti 不到一年即達 2 萬顆 GitHub 星。

summary.en: Breakthrough medicines unlocking the biology of heme.
summary.zh: 以解開血基質生物學打造突破性藥物。

highlight.en: Velorum Therapeutics is developing breakthrough medicines by unlocking the biology of heme.
highlight.zh: Velorum Therapeutics 透過解開血基質的生物學,開發突破性藥物。

summary.en: Every student's personalized learning assistant.
summary.zh: 每位學生的個人化學習助理。

highlight.en: Shepherd combines AI self-study, affordable tutoring, peer collaboration, and analytics into a personalized learning experience that schools provide to students.
highlight.zh: Shepherd 結合 AI 自學、平價家教、同儕協作與分析,提供學校發給學生的個人化學習體驗。

summary.en: An AI platform for phone-first sellers.
summary.zh: 為以電話為主的銷售者打造的 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Terrakotta is a power-dialer that clones brokers' voices to leave A/B-tested, personalized voicemails that get callbacks, starting with commercial real estate.
highlight.zh: Terrakotta 是一款自動撥號工具,可複製經紀人的聲音留下經 A/B 測試的個人化語音留言以爭取回電,從商業地產切入。

summary.en: AI-powered workflows for energy infrastructure.
summary.zh: 為能源基礎設施打造的 AI 工作流程。

highlight.en: Spark indexed over 1M zoning and permitting documents so solar, storage, and data-center developers can spot project requirements and fatal flaws in seconds.
highlight.zh: Spark 已索引逾百萬份分區與許可文件,讓太陽能、儲能與資料中心開發商能在數秒內看出專案要求與致命缺陷。

summary.en: Frontier voice input — write 4x faster than typing.
summary.zh: 前沿語音輸入,書寫比打字快 4 倍。

highlight.en: Aqua is AI dictation that works in any text field from Cursor to the terminal, starting in under 50ms and inserting text as fast as 450ms with top accuracy.
highlight.zh: Aqua 是可用於 Cursor 到終端機等任何文字欄位的 AI 聽寫,啟動低於 50 毫秒、插入文字最快 450 毫秒,並具頂尖準確度。

summary.en: CPQ for humans and agents.
summary.zh: 為人與代理打造的 CPQ。

highlight.en: Built for small teams rather than 500-person sales orgs, Veles uses AI agents to handle quoting, approvals, and deal docs by connecting Salesforce or HubSpot.
highlight.zh: Veles 為小型團隊(而非五百人銷售組織)打造,透過串接 Salesforce 或 HubSpot,以 AI 代理處理報價、簽核與交易文件。

summary.en: AI employees who love overtime.
summary.zh: 愛加班的 AI 員工。

highlight.en: Marblism's AI employees handle recurring tasks like sales emails, social posts, Google Ads, and inbox management after a one-time setup, no prompts needed.
highlight.zh: Marblism 的 AI 員工在一次性設定後,即可處理銷售郵件、社群貼文、Google Ads 與收件匣管理等重複工作,無需下提示。

summary.en: The Bloomberg Terminal of sports betting.
summary.zh: 運動博彩界的彭博終端機。

highlight.en: OddsView's terminal lets users browse millions of real-time odds with EV and arbitrage finders plus exclusive tools like historical odds charts.
highlight.zh: OddsView 的終端機讓用戶瀏覽數百萬筆即時賠率,並提供期望值與套利搜尋器,以及歷史賠率圖表等獨家工具。

summary.en: Generate fast, reliable APIs for any platform.
summary.zh: 為任何平台生成快速可靠的 API。

highlight.en: Integuru turns any platform into a low-latency API with requests completing in 3 seconds at 99.9%+ success, no RPA, browsers, or data caching required.
highlight.zh: Integuru 把任何平台變成低延遲 API,請求 3 秒內完成、成功率逾 99.9%,且無需 RPA、瀏覽器或資料快取。

summary.en: AI-powered auto-resolutions and reply suggestions for customer support.
summary.zh: 為客服提供 AI 自動結案與回覆建議。

highlight.en: Quivr helps support teams draft responses, automate replies, and resolve tickets directly inside platforms like Zendesk, cutting repetitive work.
highlight.zh: Quivr 協助客服團隊在 Zendesk 等平台內直接草擬回覆、自動回應並結案,減少重複性工作。

summary.en: An AI math problem solver for personalized learning.
summary.zh: 用於個人化學習的 AI 數學解題器。

highlight.en: Formerly MathGPTPro, Mathos has reached over 1M students in 200+ countries and claims roughly 20% higher accuracy than GPT-4o on quantitative problems.
highlight.zh: 前身為 MathGPTPro 的 Mathos 已觸及逾 200 國、超過 100 萬名學生,並宣稱在量化問題上準確度比 GPT-4o 高約 20%。

summary.en: Tools for agent verification.
summary.zh: 用於代理驗證的工具。

highlight.en: Million builds verification to keep pace with coding agents, aiming to unlock long-horizon agents that run for days and prove their work as they go.
highlight.zh: Million 打造能跟上編碼代理速度的驗證工具,目標是讓可運行數日、邊做邊證明成果的長程代理成為可能。

summary.en: An AI research lab automating all of investing.
summary.zh: 致力於自動化整個投資流程的 AI 研究實驗室。

highlight.en: Event Horizon Labs scales autonomous research using markets as its verification loop: agents turn hypotheses into strategies, test them, and compound what survives.
highlight.zh: Event Horizon Labs 以市場作為驗證迴路擴展自主研究:代理把假設化為策略、加以測試,並複利累積存活下來的成果。

summary.en: AI that updates your CRM for you.
summary.zh: 替你更新 CRM 的 AI。

highlight.en: DryMerge's agents monitor email, calendar, and calls to organize relationship data into CRM records, built on a platform for agents that integrate with business apps.
highlight.zh: DryMerge 的代理監看郵件、行事曆與通話,把關係資料整理進 CRM 紀錄,並建立在可與商業應用整合的代理平台之上。

summary.en: Build AI support agents in minutes.
summary.zh: 數分鐘內建立 AI 客服代理。

highlight.en: Duckie lets support teams turn their tasks and processes into reliable AI workflows, from answering technical questions to processing refunds.
highlight.zh: Duckie 讓客服團隊把自家任務與流程轉為可靠的 AI 工作流程,從回答技術問題到處理退款皆可涵蓋。

summary.en: An AI-powered phone platform for dentists.
summary.zh: 為牙醫打造的 AI 電話平台。

highlight.en: Newton replaces outdated phone systems for retail healthcare practices with an agentic platform handling scheduling, billing, and patient communication.
highlight.zh: Newton 以一個處理排程、帳務與病患溝通的代理平台,取代零售醫療診所過時的電話系統,從牙醫切入。

summary.en: n8n for coding agents.
summary.zh: 為編碼代理打造的 n8n。

highlight.en: Keystroke is a code-based, open-source way to build AI agents and automations, designed for coding agents like Cursor and Claude Code.
highlight.zh: Keystroke 是一種以程式碼為基礎的開源方式來建構 AI 代理與自動化,專為 Cursor、Claude Code 等編碼代理設計。

summary.en: Expedia for ordering blank apparel.
summary.zh: 訂購空白服飾界的 Expedia。

highlight.en: DGI lets custom screen printers connect their vendor accounts to compare prices, inventory, and shipping across vendors, and manage carts and tracking in one place.
highlight.zh: DGI 讓客製化網版印刷商串接既有供應商帳號,跨供應商比較價格、庫存與運送,並在單一平台管理購物車與物流追蹤。

summary.en: Fractal Labs is a consumer technology startup from YC's Winter 2024 batch.
summary.zh: Fractal Labs 是 YC 2024 冬季梯次的一家消費科技新創。

highlight.en: Fractal Labs is a U.S.-based consumer company in YC's Winter 2024 batch, operating in the gaming space per its .gg domain.
highlight.zh: Fractal Labs 是 YC 2024 冬季梯次、位於美國的消費型公司,由其 .gg 網域可見聚焦於遊戲領域。

summary.en: An AI assistant for Excel.
summary.zh: 用於 Excel 的 AI 助理。

highlight.en: Carousel builds and edits Excel models in minutes, ingesting data from PDFs, CSVs, and images, walking through cell dependencies, and formatting professionally.
highlight.zh: Carousel 在數分鐘內建立並編輯 Excel 模型,可從 PDF、CSV 與圖片匯入資料、講解儲存格相依關係,並專業地排版格式。

summary.en: The modern surety bond platform.
summary.zh: 現代化的擔保保證金平台。

highlight.en: SuretyNow lets businesses apply for surety bonds and get affordable quotes online in minutes, targeting an $8B U.S. market with the simplest online experience.
highlight.zh: SuretyNow 讓企業在線上數分鐘內申請擔保保證金並取得平價報價,以最簡便的線上體驗鎖定美國 80 億美元市場。

summary.en: A marketplace for B2B businesses to buy warm intros.
summary.zh: 讓 B2B 企業購買暖性引薦的交易市場。

highlight.en: PartnerHQ builds a professional network graph from relationship signals; since its Feb 2024 launch it signed hundreds of paying companies, 97% inbound or word-of-mouth.
highlight.zh: PartnerHQ 從關係訊號建構專業人脈圖譜;自 2024 年 2 月推出以來已簽下數百家付費企業,其中 97% 來自自然流入或口碑。

summary.en: An AI agent that generates unit and integration tests.
summary.zh: 生成單元與整合測試的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Tusk sits in CI and generates tests with codebase context whenever engineers raise a PR, preventing critical regressions while increasing test coverage.
highlight.zh: Tusk 駐留於 CI,在工程師發起 PR 時即以程式庫脈絡生成測試,防止關鍵回歸並同時提升測試覆蓋率。

summary.en: Supercharging insurance brokers and advisors.
summary.zh: 為保險經紀人與顧問大幅增能。

highlight.en: Lucite is an AI-native platform that ingests unstructured carrier documents to extract data, create insights, and generate deliverables for insurance brokers.
highlight.zh: Lucite 是一個 AI 原生平台,擷取非結構化的保險公司文件以提取資料、產生洞見並為保險經紀人生成交付物。

summary.en: QA agents that write tests 10x faster with zero maintenance.
summary.zh: 零維護、寫測試快 10 倍的 QA 代理。

highlight.en: Decipher AI generates and self-maintains E2E tests, catching issues before customers do and alerting on live bugs, used by Bilt, Arize, and Vial.
highlight.zh: Decipher AI 生成並自我維護端到端測試,在客戶之前發現問題並對線上錯誤示警,獲 Bilt、Arize 與 Vial 採用。

summary.en: Intelligent medical record reviews.
summary.zh: 智慧化的病歷審閱。

highlight.en: InQuery automatically indexes, labels, and summarizes patient records, reasoning over each to surface key insights for physicians and attorneys at a glance.
highlight.zh: InQuery 自動索引、標記並摘要病患病歷,對每份紀錄推理以一目了然地為醫師與律師呈現關鍵洞見。

summary.en: Describe it. Find it. Act on it.
summary.zh: 描述它、找到它、據此行動。

highlight.en: EdgeTrace unifies an entire camera network into one intelligence platform that helps public safety teams detect threats faster and respond in real time.
highlight.zh: EdgeTrace 把整個攝影機網路整合成單一情報平台,協助公共安全團隊更快偵測威脅並即時應變。

summary.en: An agentic marketing platform.
summary.zh: 代理式行銷平台。

highlight.en: JustAI runs always-on AI agents for one-to-one personalization at scale.
highlight.zh: JustAI 以全天候運作的 AI 代理,大規模實現一對一個人化。

summary.en: Nonprofit financial management.
summary.zh: 非營利組織財務管理。

highlight.en: Givefront replaces spreadsheets with real-time budgeting, built-in compliance, and integrations so nonprofits can control every dollar and protect every grant.
highlight.zh: Givefront 以即時預算、內建法遵與整合功能取代試算表,讓非營利組織掌控每一分錢並守護每一筆補助款。

summary.en: The AI labor company.
summary.zh: AI 勞動力公司。

highlight.en: Brainbase Labs is an applied AI research lab enabling AI in the workforce by building high-fidelity agent environments and tooling.
highlight.zh: Brainbase Labs 是一間應用 AI 研究實驗室,透過打造高擬真的代理環境與工具,讓 AI 進入職場勞動力。

summary.en: The video-first food delivery app — imagine TikTok meets DoorDash.
summary.zh: 以影片為主的外送 App,想像 TikTok 結合 DoorDash。

highlight.en: BiteSight shows users videos of food from nearby restaurants with recommendations and social proof from friends, targeting a $30B delivery opportunity.
highlight.zh: BiteSight 向用戶展示鄰近餐廳的美食影片,並結合推薦與來自朋友的社群佐證,鎖定 300 億美元的外送商機。

summary.en: Create hit songs with AI.
summary.zh: 用 AI 創作熱門歌曲。

highlight.en: Sonauto is an AI music editor that turns prompts, lyrics, or melodies into full songs in any style in minutes — like a birthday song sung by Frank Sinatra.
highlight.zh: Sonauto 是一款 AI 音樂編輯器,能在數分鐘內把提示、歌詞或旋律變成任何風格的完整歌曲,例如由法蘭克‧辛納屈獻唱的生日歌。
